title: Monty Python em Busca do Cálice Sagrado
originalTitle: Monty Python and the Holy Grail
overview: O Rei Artur sai à procura de cavaleiros que o acompanhe em uma atabalhoada jornada histórica: A busca do Santo Graal. Aparecem então Sir Lancelot, o Bravo; Sir Robin, o Não-Tão-Bravo-Quanto-Sir-Lancelot; Sir Galahad, o Puro, entre outros personagens surreais.

cast.name: Graham Chapman
cast.character: King Arthur / Voice of God / Middle Head / Hiccoughing Guard

cast.name: John Cleese
cast.character: Second Swallow-Savvy Guard / The Black Knight / Peasant 3 / Sir Launcelot the Brave / Taunting French Guard / Tim the Enchanter

cast.name: Eric Idle
cast.character: Dead Collector / Peasant 1 / Sir Robin the Not-Quite-So-Brave-as-Sir Launcelot / First Swamp Castle Guard / Concorde / Roger the Shrubber / Brother Maynard

cast.name: Terry Gilliam
cast.character: Patsy / Green Knight / Old Man from Scene 24 (Bridgekeeper) / Sir Bors / Animator / Gorilla Hand

cast.name: Terry Jones
cast.character: Dennis's Mother / Sir Bedevere / Left Head / Prince Herbert / Voice of Cartoon Scribe

cast.name: Michael Palin
cast.character: First Swallow-Savvy Guard / Dennis / Peasant 2 / Right Head / Sir Galahad the Pure / Narrator / King of Swamp Castle / Brother Maynard's Brother / Leader of The Knights Who Say NI!

cast.name: Neil Innes
cast.character: First Monk / Singing Minstrel / Page Crushed by the Rabbit / Peasant #4
